transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. This is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she's sending a referral to a dermatologist, but I haven't heard anything yet.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can check that for you. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Carla Medina, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Carla. I see Dr. Owens submitted a referral to Lakeside Dermatology two days ago. It's been approved.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Do I need to call them myself to book?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, you'll want to call Lakeside Dermatology directly at 555-201-3487 to schedule. Mention the referral number, which is R-88234.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Exactly right. Also, your plan covers this specialist visit with just a $30 copay, no additional authorization needed.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That's a relief. Thank you for clearing this up.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carla. Is there anything else I can help with today?
